creator: dp@penix.org
text:
The sound card (crystal 4237b) compiles fine and all necessary device 
nodes are created without error. However unable to adjust sound settings
(volume, bass, balance, etc) via software. Worked fine under 4.3-STABLE. 

Currently compiled as:
sbc0: <SoundBlaster Pro> at port 0x220-0x22f irq 5 drq 1 on isa0
pcm0: <SB DSP 3.02> on sbc0
